projects.title: My Spotify Top 5
projects.blurb: A self-indulgent dashboard for your most-played artists, tracks, and genres. Auth with Spotify, rebuilt every page in React.

projects.title: Translate IM
projects.blurb: An instant messenger that translates conversations in-line. Built for cross-language pen-pals.

projects.title: Shopping List
